name: NETGEAR, INC.
business: NETGEAR is a global provider of networking technologies for businesses, homes, and service providers. It delivers a wide range of networking hardware, software, and services designed to enable reliable connectivity and security. The company operates in two segments: Enterprise (solutions for small and medium enterprises including Pro AV, wireless LAN, cloud-managed networking, and security) and Consumer (WiFi mesh systems, routers, broadband modems, mobile hotspots, and subscription services).
namedSuppliers: Cloud Network Technology (Hon Hai Precision / Foxconn Corporation)
